title: R2-TEST: Missing test for U+FEFF in canonicalize_display_name
description: The ZWS_CHARS constant includes U+FEFF (added in Round 2 P2 fixes), but no test case verifies it is stripped. All other ZWS chars (U+200B, U+200C, U+2060) have explicit test cases. Test module is incomplete per epic acceptance criteria.
